name: Mughali Lamb Khorma
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and fry onions until golden.
2. Add green chili, ginger, and garlic pastes and fry well.
3. Add chili powder, garam masala, and coriander, frying with a little water to prevent burning the paste.
4. When the oil separates from the paste, add chopped tomatoes and cook.
5. Once the tomatoes are cooked, add lamb, yoghurt, and salt to taste. Cook until the lamb is tender.
6. Add ground cashew nuts and coconut cream, then simmer for another 5 minutes.
